items.prompt: solves bounded proportional application and scale-model situations accurately
items.expected_evidence: solve for unknowns in scale drawings, map scales, recipes, similar-shape, and conversion-style proportional contexts
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies corresponding quantities and preserves the proportional relationship accurately.

items.prompt: explains how invariant ratio or scale factor determines unknown values in an applied proportional situation
items.expected_evidence: explain why the same multiplicative relationship must hold across corresponding quantities
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the applied proportional structure coherently.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to scale_factor_instability.
items.expected_evidence: represent proportional applications using tables, unit-rate reasoning, or scale-factor structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer broke the invariant ratio or scale-factor relationship.

items.prompt: succeeds across table, diagram, verbal, measurement, and simple contextual proportional-application representations
items.expected_evidence: judge whether a proportional result is reasonable relative to the original quantities and scale
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves proportional-application meaning across multiple representations and contexts.
